variants.title: FilterFinder FF300080C Compressed Air Filter | Replaces the Domnick Hunter K220AA
variants.option1Value: FilterFinder FF300080C Compressed Air Filter | Replaces the Domnick Hunter K220AA
variants.description: The FF300080C is our FilterFinder Approved replacement to the Domnick Hunter K220AA. Our element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of the original Domnick Hunter filter, ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with our polyester needle felt media and a durable design, the FF300080C provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. With FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Compressed Air Filter, Media: Polyester Needle Felt, Efficiency 1: 0.01µ, Outer Diameter: 85.6 mm, Inner Diameter: 51.9 mm, Length: 342.5 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: +1 - +80°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 0.01µ, Media Type: Polyester Needle Felt, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile
